steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage says Chicago has "everything from monumental sculptures like Pablo Picasso's Chicago Picasso at sites like Daley Plaza to innovative street art like Marcus Rivera's mural Standing Wave located on West Lake Street." This signals a wide range or variety of public art.

steps.title: Match the meaning to the choices
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean wide range or variety because the passage lists art across different forms and locations. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — controversy over: "The controversy over public art" — controversy means disagreement or dispute; the passage praises the collection, not debates it. ✗
  • Choice B — breadth of: "The breadth of public art" — breadth means wide range or scope, directly matching the passage's range from monumental sculptures to street art. ✓
  • Choice C — apathy toward: "The apathy toward public art" — apathy means lack of interest or indifference, contradicting the enthusiastic tone. ✗
  • Choice D — confusion about: "The confusion about public art" — confusion means bewilderment; the passage describes a satisfying variety, not disorientation. ✗
B is correct.
